query:
-- Get all billing items for the 7 affected customers
-- Allegra (C0011), Creek St Pharmacy, Smile IT, Wide Bay Transport, Complete Care Doctors, Cleveland Medical, Logan Central
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.billingPlatform
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name IN (
  'Allegra Property Management Pty Ltd',
  'Creek St Pharmacy',
  'Smile IT',
  'Wide Bay Transport & Mechanical',
  'Complete Care Doctors',
  'Cleveland Medical',
  'Logan Central Family Clinic'
)
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.unitAmount, bi.quantity, 
         bi.matchStatus, bi.customerExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.billingPlatform
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.lineAmount DESC;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Get all billing items for the 7 affected customers
-- Allegra (C0011), Creek St Pharmacy, Smile IT, Wide Bay Transport, Complete Care Doctors, Cleveland Medical, Logan Central
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.unitAmount,
  bi.quantity,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  MAX(c.name) as customerName,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.billingPlatform
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name IN (
  'Allegra Property Management Pty Ltd',
  'Creek St Pharmacy',
  'Smile IT',
  'Wide Bay Transport & Mechanical',
  'Complete Care Doctors',
  'Cleveland Medical',
  'Logan Central Family Clinic'
)
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.unitAmount, bi.quantity, 
         bi.matchStatus, bi.customerExternalId, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.billingPlatform
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.lineAmount DESC;
